title: Spear & Jackson Razorsharp Wooden Handle Hedge Shears - FSC Lacquered Hardwood Handles (240mm) - General Purpose Shears for Topiary, Trimming & Shaping - Carbon Steel Chrome Plated
features: Cuts Thicker Stems with Ease – Notched chrome-plated steel blades deliver smooth, clean cuts through dense branches and stems, perfect for shaping hedges, shrubs, and bushes
Rust-Resistant & Long-Lasting Blades – Durable chrome-plated steel resists rust and corrosion, keeping your blades sharp and reliable season after season
Comfortable Ergonomic Design – Wishbone-shaped handles provide a secure, comfortable grip to reduce hand fatigue during extended use in the garden
Eco-Friendly Hardwood Handles – Crafted from FSC-certified hardwood, the 240mm handles are weatherproofed and lacquered for strength, sustainability, and long-term use
Built for Everyday Garden Tasks – Whether you're tidying up borders or tackling overgrown hedges, these hedge shears offer dependable performance and precise control
description: Make shaping and maintaining your garden easier with these high-quality hedge shears — designed for precision, comfort, and long-lasting use. The notched, chrome-plated steel blades cut cleanly through thicker stems while resisting rust and corrosion to maintain sharpness over time. The ergonomic wishbone-shaped handles, crafted from FSC-certified hardwood, offer a secure and comfortable grip that reduces hand fatigue. Measuring 240mm, the lacquered and weatherproofed handles combine strength with sustainability, making them ideal for a variety of outdoor gardening tasks. Key Features: Notched blades for clean, easy cutting of thicker stems Chrome-plated steel resists rust and stays sharp Ergonomic wishbone handles for comfort and control FSC-certified hardwood, weatherproofed and lacquered for durability Ideal for shaping and trimming hedges, shrubs, and bushes A dependable and eco-conscious addition to your garden tools — built for comfort, durability, and clean results every time.
